summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of automotive SaaS landing page. All sections, navigation, interactive elements, and responsive design working perfectly.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with background image, main heading, and CTAs
Navigation sticky header with glass effect
Navigation links scroll to correct sections (Features, How it Works, Pricing, FAQ)
Market Intelligence features bento grid section (5 feature cards)
Tuning Intelligence features bento grid section (6 feature cards)
How It Works section with 4 steps displayed correctly
Pricing section with 4 pricing cards (Basic, Pro, Elite, Combined)
FAQ accordion functionality - expand/collapse works perfectly
Footer newsletter form submission with toast notifications
Form validation for empty email addresses
All required data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Responsive design works on mobile and desktop viewports
Dark theme with animations implemented properly
